input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.9 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.9
            TITLE: fuel system (ic only)

            CONTENT:
            rule F.9: FUEL SYSTEM (IC ONLY)
F.9 FUEL SYSTEM (IC ONLY) 
Fuel System Location and Protection are subject to approval during SES review and Technical 
Inspection.

RULE: f.9.2
            TITLE: protection

            CONTENT:
            rule F.9.2: Protection
F.9.2 Protection 
All Fuel Tanks must be shielded from side or rear impact
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 49 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: FUEL SYSTEM (IC ONLY) F.9 FUEL SYSTEM (IC ONLY) Fuel System Location and Protection are subject to approval during SES review and Technical Inspection.
